form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 3rd of 12 at Machecoul on February 22 over 2350m, on rain affected going; 2.5 len behind Dschingis Neckara with 58kg at $13. Last start won by 1.75 len at Senonnes-Pouanc? March 13 over 1350m on a heavy track defeating Vega Memories carrying 55.5kg at $6.60. Well placed and sure to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation fourth of 12 at Pornichet January 24 over 2100m, 5 len behind Australasia carrying 58kg at $10. On debut fifth of 9 at Lignieres November 1 over 1600m, soft track; 5 len behind Hey Jo with 53kg at $8.70. Open to improvement and expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last run 5th of 8 at Lyon-Parilly on March 15 over 1600m, 5 len behind Night Mary with 58kg at $4.10. At only start last preparation 8th of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on December 9 over 1900m, 16 len behind Just The Two Of Us with 58kg at $8.30. Plenty of improvement to come.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 35 day let-up. Last start ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 13 at Bordeaux on March 10 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Claudia Chop with 58kg at $5.10. Before that 4th of 11 at Chantilly All Weather on February 27 over 1300m, 1.1 len behind El Jeque with 54.5kg at $10. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation seventh of 12 at Deauville All Weather December 17 over 1400m, 6 len behind Kailani with 51.5kg at $45. On debut seventh of 9 at Chantilly May 6 over 1000m, 7 len behind Focus with 58kg at $7.60. Returns in a winnable race.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 9 at Pornichet on March 25 over 1700m, 6 len behind Camponanes with 57.5kg at $7.50. Before that 5th of 15 at Pornichet on February 27 over 1700m, 3.5 len behind Lotus carrying 58kg at $22. Prefer to see him back in form.
